title: CursedOrigins
description: Origins Addon with not so serious additions
body:
![CursedOrigins Banner](https://i.imgur.com/jdC6CKv.png)

| [![Fabric API](https://i.imgur.com/Ol1Tcf8.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | [![Origins (Fabric)](https://i.imgur.com/mOYS065.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) |
|---|---|

## CursedOrigins is a joke mod. It is not supposed to be balanced in any way, shape or form so be wary when adding it to a world. 

### There is minor use of profanity in this mod.

### CursedOrigins is a non serious Origins Addon that adds in Origins that are too stupid for a serious mod. 
## Currently featuring 2 Origins and 1 hidden Origin:
![CursedOrigins Origins](https://i.imgur.com/1io21Xg.png)

## Disable/Enables Origins Datapack
[Here's a link for the datapacks that disables/enables any Origins added by this mod, just delete the files of the ones you don't want modified and you should be set.](https://github.com/MerchantPug/toomanyorigins-cursedorigins-datapacks)
